subject: [Pre-read] CB FP&A monthly Initiatives and Update_Jan'26

content.answer:
Hi Ian and Jianghong,

Pls find attached materials for tmr's FP&A monthly meeting, we focus on two
key updates
1. 2025 Yearly Review
2. Commission Increase Impact to CB (cut off by 12th number, preliminary)

Best,

*Faye Yan*

Shopee | Cross Border

*Mobile:* +65 87767030

*Address:* 5 Science Park Drive, Shopee Building, Singapore 118265

Hi Ian and Jianghong,


Please see the follow-up items from yesterday FP&A meeting below:


S/N

Key Topics

Action Items

PIC

Timeline

Status

1

TH TAX

Align with CN SLS team for duty tax mark up approach and timeline

Faye/Edric

Jan 16th

WIP

2

KRJP Commission Increase

Work with KR/JP team to finalize the market-level plan and complete seller
announcements by next Monday

KR Team/Jiaqi

Jan 19th

WIP

3

Commission Increase Impact to topline and NPC

To further monitor the impact of the commission fee increase on topline and
P&L over a longer period, and review NPC by early next month

Jiaqi

Feb 6th

WIP



And reattach the screenshot for the summary of by BU MP charge rate change
(Page 12)  below, and the conclusion stays:  3P SLS same as 3PF, and higher
than FBS

[image: image.png]

Note: PH 3P SLS/3PF Base Comms gap by ~0.3p.p coming from CAT mix as 3PF
following local shops charged by CAT.

Best.

content.question:
I thought we were
still checking with legal on paid ads program?

content.answer:
Hi Ian,
In general, no issue in rolling out commission increase from Feb and
compulsory ads program from Mar for KR/Feb for JP and will send out 1
seller comms tomorrow. Thanks

For KR >> announce both commission and ads program together in 1 seller
comms (ETA tmr)

   - commission increase: seller comms ready
   - compulsory ads program: *cleared with legal, but postponed to Mar on
   the roll out date due to system configuration needed*

For JP >> announce both commission and ads program together in 1 seller
comms(ETA tmr)

   - commission increase: seller comms ready
   - compulsory ads program: cleared with legal to start from Feb
